adaptive_meal_plan.breakfast: 2 Whole wheat paneer stuffed parathas (prepared with minimal salt and olive oil) served with 1 cup of plain low-fat curd and a handful of soaked almonds.
adaptive_meal_plan.lunch: 1 cup Brown rice, 2 small whole wheat rotis, 150g skinless Chicken curry (cooked with ginger, garlic, and turmeric; low sodium), and a large bowl of sautéed spinach and carrots.
adaptive_meal_plan.dinner: 150g Lemon-garlic grilled fish (Pomfret or Rohu) served with 1 cup of Vegetable Dalia (broken wheat) khichdi containing peas and beans, with no added table salt.
adaptive_meal_plan.snack: A large bowl of mixed sprouts salad (moong and chana) with chopped tomatoes, onions, and freshly squeezed lemon juice (no salt added), plus one medium apple.
